title: No Docker targets in project without Dockerfile — acceptable
makefile_snippet:
.DEFAULT_GOAL := help

build-api: ## Build API binary
	@mkdir -p bin
	go build -ldflags "$(LDFLAGS)" -o bin/api ./cmd/api

test: ## Run tests
	go test -race ./...

.PHONY: help build-api test
expected_feedback: no defect; docker-build/docker-push targets are only needed when Dockerfile is present
